title: oxydectes californica
intro: Oxydectes californica, also known as California root or Yerba de la Estrella, is a medicinal plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the aster family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Oxydectes californica is valued for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant's roots and leaves are used to prepare herbal remedies that offer various health benefits, including digestive support, wound healing, and relief from respiratory issues. Oxydectes californica can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
